uplink.description: EMS Desk temperature, humidity, accelerometer, and occupancy (TTN upstream example input)
uplink._note: Wire-format decode (temperature 22.6, humidity 41, acc 1/39/5, occupancy 2) reproduced from reference/upstream-codec.js. Normalization (occupancy -> action.motion, acc -> camelCase extras) authored here.

uplink.description: Synthetic: negative temperature, humidity, vacant occupancy, battery voltage
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic payload. Expected raw values (temp -5.3, humidity 55, occupancy 0, vdd 3600 mV) computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js; battery normalized mV/1000 = 3.6 V.

uplink.description: Synthetic error: unrecognized Elsys type byte (0x3D DEBUG)
uplink._note: Type 0x3D (DEBUG) is unsupported; decode recognizes nothing and returns an error.
